name: hpe-san-monorepo
description: Unified orchestration for HPE SAN services

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "SIM,API,BOT,DSH" -c "magenta,cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev:simulator" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:chatbot" "npm run dev:dashboard"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm --prefix chatbot-service install && npm --prefix dashboard install
